name: Komga
longDescription:
Komga is a free, open-source media server for your comics, mangas, BDs (bandes dessinées), magazines, and eBooks.

It offers a responsive web UI for browsing libraries, series, and books; a built-in web reader with multiple reading modes; per-library user access control with age/label restrictions; metadata editing and automatic embedded-metadata import; collections and read lists; OPDS v1/v2 feeds; Kobo and KOReader sync; duplicate file/page detection; and a full REST API for community tooling.
description: Media server for comics, mangas, BDs, magazines and eBooks with web reader and OPDS.
